Now it's time to start getting deeper into what they are and how they work and all the building blocks and all those types of things. And so we dive into here. Secret number nine is be talking about funnel hacking, how we reverse engineer successful funnels. And so a lot of times, I know for most people, I know it feels like when they first get in here, they start building a funnel and they start trying to create stuff without a blueprint. You wouldn't go build a house without a blueprint. And so for me, before I build any business, any funnel, first I'm looking for is like, what's worked in the past? And I want to find something that's successful and then we model them. And there'll be videos down below to show you how to do it, how to find the right people, how to funnel hack and how to look at those kind of things. But that's the first big step is reverse engineering successful funnels. So you understand what you need to be building. By the way, funneling university, one of the big benefits of that is every single month we funnel hack two businesses. We show their funnels and there's videos and handouts and a whole new print newsletter that goes through them. So when you got this book, you can log in the members area and there's tons of funnels that have already been funnel hacked for you. And not only a funnel hack, we also give you the funnels and it just helps speed up your time. So make sure you're using that tool as well. Number 10, we're going to walk through the seven, a secret number 10, we're going to walk through the seven phases of a funnel. First time I ever gave this presentation was at one of Bill Glazer and Dan Kennedy's mastermind groups when they're highest level and I showed it and people were like just blew their mind about how this whole thing works. And when you understand here's the phases of a funnel, here's where someone's going through, here's the psychology of what's happening at each of these steps. We understand that man, it becomes so much easier because now you can replicate that. Again, for me, it's always about what's the pattern, we understand the pattern, then you can look at the pattern, you can figure out how to make things better at each step. So the seven steps of a funnel will be huge for you. Also the 23 building blocks, like what are the actual things you can use in each of these different steps inside the funnel. We talk about the difference between front end funnels and back end funnels and how to create the best type of bait. So that's everything that you're going to be going through here inside the dot com secrets book. Like I said, there'll be videos down below that kind of walk through each thing. And then this book is kind of a bonus thing that I created. When we first wrote the dot com secrets book, people started creating all sorts of funnels and they were kind of just like, here's a funnel, here's a funnel, here's a funnel, and they're all over the place. And I know that the way that we did it is in my mind it was all about like there was a process. We talked about value ladder, right? We're taking someone through a value ladder and I always look at like my funnels are a value ladder. And last module we talked about follow up funnels and how the communication funnel bridges people from funnel one to funnel two to funnel three. And so what this book was, I was actually on a flight to London with my family. All my kids were asleep on the plane. I started writing this because I was like, I want to show people how in my business, how these things tie together. And so I show how the three core funnels in my business, how they work together. Now your business might be different. You might not be using the same funnels I am using, but conceptually behind this, this shows you like for me the front end funnel was my book funnel. And after I'm done with the book, like what happens? Well there's a whole communication funnel, those emails, then lead them to the second funnel, which is my webinar funnel. And then there's a whole, which is moving people up the value ladder. And then after they watch the webinar, then there's a whole bunch of emails in the community and a follow up funnel, communication funnel, and move somebody up now to my inner circle. And there's a whole process. And so this book shows the three funnels. It shows the emails that glue everything together and kind of show you how funnel stacking works. And they're basically taking somebody from one funnel to the next to the next. And I hope that between these two things, they'll give you guys a really good idea of how to structure funnels, how all those things work together, and then how we glue them together through funnel stacking with your communication and your follow up funnels. So I know this is probably like getting like 18 PhDs in marketing in one training course. I've had people tell me that just going through this book with they learn more than they did in an entire MBA program. And I get that like we're going deep. We're going to a lot of stuff. And so take your time with it. Go through it. Think through it. Listen. Come into our communities and ask questions. But it's worth understanding these things, you guys.
